title: Iran’s Navy Is Weakened but U.S. Still Faces Challenges in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: U.S. strikes have heavily targeted Iran’s large ships and bases, but its Revolutionary Guard navy is a more nimble force.
summary_public: U.S. strikes have heavily targeted Iran’s large ships and bases, but its Revolutionary Guard navy is a more nimble force.
